phases.name: API Connection Setup
phases.description: Establish reliable GitHub API connection with rate limiting

tasks.title: GitHub API Rate Limit Management System
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive rate limit handling for GitHub API requests with monitoring and retry logic

subtasks.title: Implement rate limit detection middleware
subtasks.description: Create middleware to detect GitHub API rate limit headers and current usage
subtasks.technical_details: Monitor X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset headers

subtasks.title: Build exponential backoff retry logic
subtasks.description: Implement intelligent retry mechanism with exponential backoff for rate-limited requests
subtasks.technical_details: Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s with jitter

subtasks.title: Create rate limit status dashboard component
subtasks.description: Build UI component showing current rate limit status and usage statistics
subtasks.technical_details: Real-time display of remaining calls, reset time, usage graphs

subtasks.title: Develop high-volume request testing suite
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive test suite to validate rate limiting under high load
subtasks.technical_details: Simulate API bursts, validate backoff behavior, test edge cases

acceptance_criteria: Rate limit detection works for all GitHub API endpoints
Retry logic prevents API errors during high usage
Dashboard shows real-time rate limit status
System handles 1000+ requests/hour without failures

tasks.title: Repository Metadata Collection System
tasks.description: Implement automated repository metadata fetching and storage with scheduled updates

subtasks.title: Design repository metadata API endpoints
subtasks.description: Create FastAPI endpoints for fetching and managing repository metadata
subtasks.technical_details: RESTful endpoints: GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/metadata, POST /repos/sync

subtasks.title: Implement GitHub repository data fetcher
subtasks.description: Build service to fetch repository basic information and settings from GitHub API
subtasks.technical_details: Fetch: name, description, topics, language, stars, forks, settings

subtasks.title: Create repository metadata database schema
subtasks.description: Design and implement database schema for storing repository metadata
subtasks.technical_details: Tables: repositories, repo_settings, repo_stats with proper indexing

subtasks.title: Build scheduled metadata update system
subtasks.description: Implement background job system for regular metadata synchronization
subtasks.technical_details: Cron-like scheduler, configurable intervals, error handling

acceptance_criteria: Repository metadata is fetched from GitHub API
Data is stored in normalized database schema
Scheduled updates run every 6 hours automatically
API endpoints provide access to metadata

phases.name: Data Synchronization
phases.description: Real-time synchronization of Issues and Pull Requests

tasks.title: GitHub Issues Real-time Synchronization
tasks.description: Implement real-time GitHub Issues webhook handling with data normalization and storage

subtasks.title: Set up GitHub Issues webhook endpoint
subtasks.description: Create secure webhook endpoint to receive GitHub Issues events
subtasks.technical_details: POST /webhooks/github/issues with signature verification

subtasks.title: Implement issue data normalization pipeline
subtasks.description: Build data transformation pipeline to normalize GitHub Issues data format
subtasks.technical_details: Transform: title, body, labels, assignees, state, created_at, updated_at

subtasks.title: Create issues database schema and storage
subtasks.description: Design database schema for issues and implement storage operations
subtasks.technical_details: Tables: issues, issue_labels, issue_assignees with relationships

subtasks.title: Build real-time dashboard issue updates
subtasks.description: Implement WebSocket broadcasting for live issue updates in dashboard
subtasks.technical_details: WebSocket events: issue_created, issue_updated, issue_closed

acceptance_criteria: Webhook receives all GitHub Issues events securely
Issue data is normalized and stored in database
Dashboard updates in real-time when issues change
No data loss during high-frequency updates

tasks.title: Pull Requests Real-time Synchronization
tasks.description: Implement real-time GitHub Pull Requests webhook handling with comprehensive data tracking

subtasks.title: Set up GitHub PR webhook endpoint
subtasks.description: Create secure webhook endpoint to receive GitHub Pull Request events
subtasks.technical_details: POST /webhooks/github/pulls with signature verification

subtasks.title: Implement PR data normalization pipeline
subtasks.description: Build comprehensive data transformation for PR data including metrics
subtasks.technical_details: Transform: title, body, state, reviews, checks, files_changed, additions, deletions

subtasks.title: Create pull requests database schema
subtasks.description: Design comprehensive database schema for PRs with review and check data
subtasks.technical_details: Tables: pull_requests, pr_reviews, pr_checks, pr_files with foreign keys

subtasks.title: Build real-time PR dashboard updates
subtasks.description: Implement live PR status updates with review progress and check status
subtasks.technical_details: WebSocket events: pr_opened, pr_updated, review_submitted, checks_completed

acceptance_criteria: Webhook receives all GitHub PR events securely
PR data including reviews and checks is stored
Dashboard shows real-time PR status updates
Review progress and CI status visible in real-time

phases.name: Data Processing
phases.description: Data normalization, storage optimization, and real-time communication

tasks.title: Unified Data Schema and Storage System
tasks.description: Design and implement unified data schema with validation and transformation pipeline

subtasks.title: Design unified data schema architecture
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive database schema unifying all GitHub data types
subtasks.technical_details: Schema: repositories, issues, pull_requests, users, events with proper normalization

subtasks.title: Implement data transformation pipeline
subtasks.description: Build ETL pipeline for transforming GitHub API data to unified schema
subtasks.technical_details: Pipeline stages: extract, validate, transform, load with error handling

subtasks.title: Create database models and migrations
subtasks.description: Implement ORM models and database migration scripts for the unified schema
subtasks.technical_details: SQLAlchemy models, Alembic migrations, proper constraints and indexes

subtasks.title: Build comprehensive data validation system
subtasks.description: Implement data validation rules and integrity checks for all data types
subtasks.technical_details: Pydantic validators, business rules, referential integrity checks

acceptance_criteria: Unified schema accommodates all GitHub data types
Data transformation pipeline handles edge cases
Database models support efficient queries
Data validation prevents corruption

tasks.title: WebSocket Real-time Communication System
tasks.description: Implement robust WebSocket server for real-time updates with connection management

subtasks.title: Set up WebSocket server infrastructure
subtasks.description: Implement WebSocket server with FastAPI and connection pooling
subtasks.technical_details: FastAPI WebSocket endpoint, connection manager, room-based messaging

subtasks.title: Implement client connection management
subtasks.description: Build robust client connection handling with authentication and authorization
subtasks.technical_details: Connection lifecycle, authentication tokens, user session management

subtasks.title: Create event broadcasting system
subtasks.description: Build event broadcasting system for distributing updates to connected clients
subtasks.technical_details: Event types: repository, issue, pr, user events with filtering

subtasks.title: Add WebSocket reconnection logic
subtasks.description: Implement client-side reconnection logic with exponential backoff
subtasks.technical_details: Auto-reconnect, message queue during disconnect, connection status indicator

acceptance_criteria: WebSocket server handles 100+ concurrent connections
Connection management is robust and secure
Event broadcasting works reliably
Clients reconnect automatically on disconnect

phases.name: UI Integration
phases.description: Frontend integration with real-time data display

tasks.title: Dashboard API Integration Layer
tasks.description: Connect frontend to backend APIs with comprehensive data fetching and state management

subtasks.title: Create API client service layer
subtasks.description: Build TypeScript API client with all backend endpoint integrations
subtasks.technical_details: Axios client, request/response interceptors, error handling, typing

subtasks.title: Implement React data fetching hooks
subtasks.description: Create custom React hooks for data fetching with caching and state management
subtasks.technical_details: Custom hooks: useRepositories, useIssues, usePullRequests with React Query

subtasks.title: Build loading and error state components
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive loading and error state UI components
subtasks.technical_details: Loading spinners, skeleton screens, error boundaries, retry mechanisms

subtasks.title: Implement data refresh mechanisms
subtasks.description: Build manual and automatic data refresh functionality with cache invalidation
subtasks.technical_details: Pull-to-refresh, auto-refresh intervals, cache invalidation strategies

acceptance_criteria: All backend APIs are integrated in frontend
Data fetching hooks handle all states properly
Loading and error states provide good UX
Data refresh works manually and automatically

tasks.title: Real-time Data Display System
tasks.description: Implement live data visualization with animations and notifications

subtasks.title: Update UI components with WebSocket data
subtasks.description: Integrate WebSocket data streams into React components for live updates
subtasks.technical_details: WebSocket React hook, real-time state updates, data synchronization

subtasks.title: Add real-time status indicators
subtasks.description: Create visual indicators showing real-time status and activity
subtasks.technical_details: Status badges, activity indicators, connection status, last update timestamps

subtasks.title: Implement smooth data transition animations
subtasks.description: Add smooth animations for data updates and state changes
subtasks.technical_details: Framer Motion animations, data interpolation, loading transitions

subtasks.title: Create notification system for updates
subtasks.description: Build in-app notification system for important data changes
subtasks.technical_details: Toast notifications, notification center, configurable alert types

acceptance_criteria: UI updates in real-time with WebSocket data
Status indicators show current system state
Animations enhance user experience
Notifications alert users to important changes

success_criteria: All GitHub data updates within 5 seconds
Rate limit handling prevents API errors
